title: Two earbuds screen/second screen, right zoom in
scenario: Tapping right circle button on earbuds screen in Quick Start Guide causes screen to zoom in and display new text
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate to the Quick Start Guide (QSG).
Swipe or tap to view the second screen (earbuds screen).
Tap the right circle button on the screen.
expected: The screen zooms in and displays new text.
